frameworks: 1. The first step when you're creating a workflow is to set up the trigger
2. Next, we want to add a large language model to be able to look at the email content and determine if it's customer support related or not

3. Then, we'll use a switch node so that if customer support is true, it will go off and create a draft for us in response to that email; if it's false, it will notify us that we got an email that's not customer support related or any other logic
